name: camp_lake
_comment: #10: PP can walk out along the deck (walkSegments). Big blocker removed so the deck is reachable; the walk path keeps him on the planks. A 'Lake' look-hotspot (wired in game.go) gives the 'not in the mood to swim' line. Tune the deck Y in-game.
_comment_walk: 2026-06-20 #2 (round 2): still a touch low - raised another ~40px. CENTER lines (foot = y+135): far end y=393 → foot 528, near y=466 → foot 601. F3-verify the foot sits on the planks as the dock recedes to the boat.
